title: Write Gherkin scenarios for wiki rendering
description: Scenarios for: render wiki page, template functions (query, count, issue, children, blocked_by), error handling.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting Gherkin scenarios for wiki rendering. Will scope to cross-compatible MiniJinja/Jinja2 subset and keep features shared under root features/ folder.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Drafted wiki rendering Gherkin scenarios as planned and placed them in features/wiki/wiki_rendering.feature with @wip tag to keep specs stable until implementation. Scenarios cover count() and query() with simple for-loop ordering expectation.
